title: Factor Parameters — Combustion (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'combustion'. Standalone per-category schema suitable for independent validation of the `parameters` object. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

scope_applicability.description: Which GHG Protocol scopes the factor is valid for.

uncertainty_low.description: Lower 95% CI as signed fractional deviation (e.g., -0.05 = -5%).

uncertainty_high.description: Upper 95% CI as signed fractional deviation (e.g., 0.05 = +5%).

lhv_mj_per_unit.description: Lower heating value (net) in MJ per denominator unit. Net heating value excludes latent heat of water vapour.

hhv_mj_per_unit.description: Higher heating value (gross) in MJ per denominator unit. INVARIANT: when both present, hhv_mj_per_unit >= lhv_mj_per_unit.

density_kg_per_unit.description: Fuel density in kg per denominator unit at reference conditions (typically 15 °C / 1 atm for liquids, 0 °C / 1 atm for gases). Required when the denominator is volumetric and the downstream method chain multiplies by mass.

oxidation_factor.description: Fraction of fuel carbon oxidised to CO2 per IPCC 2006 Vol 2. Default 1.00 for liquid/gaseous fuels; ~0.98 for coal; ~0.99 for biomass.

fossil_carbon_share.description: Fraction of total carbon content that is fossil (0.0 for pure biofuel, 1.0 for pure fossil, 0.80 for B20, etc.).

biogenic_carbon_share.description: Fraction of total carbon that is biogenic. INVARIANT: fossil_carbon_share + biogenic_carbon_share <= 1.0 (the remainder being reserved for non-carbon matter or measurement slack).

moisture_share.description: Mass fraction of moisture in the as-received fuel (kg H2O / kg fuel). Important for biomass and coal; raises LHV correction.

sulfur_share.description: Mass fraction of sulfur in the fuel (kg S / kg fuel). Drives SOx co-reporting but does not affect CO2e.

ash_share.description: Mass fraction of ash in the as-received fuel (kg ash / kg fuel). INVARIANT: moisture_share + ash_share + fossil_carbon_share + biogenic_carbon_share + sulfur_share <= 1.0 over the full fuel composition.
